name: Raven (Rune Factory 3)
description:
Quiet and reserved elf-like girl from Rune Factory 3. Best enjoyed with a dedicated persona.

Personal and experimental bot. Made public because someone, somewhere, might enjoy it as much as I do. Trying to train it to make it as close to canon as possible with my swipes (it's hard). If you're here, thank you for your time. Please be nice to Raven.
creator: Ryuu1231
